text:
Once upon an autumn afternoon.

Sophie loved reading. Every Thursday she'd visit Mrs. Willoughby's antique shop. That's where she found her stories.

In a corner tucked behind dusty velvet chairs, there lay a worn tome. Leaves cracked its brittle cover. Sophie edged closer.

Inside sparkled midnight blue parchment. Stories like stars. Once she picked up The Owl Pewter Cousin. Stars twinkling in its ears.

A hare dashed through. Sophie chased. Birds screamed.

One leap.

Snow fluttered down.

She found the owl. Silent, wise. Stories whispered secrets.

Days later. A secret tree.

She found silver baits. Nights dreams. Silent songs.

She built. Evergreen.

Moonlit owl nights.

She'd listen.

Stars fell rain.

Silent stories.

Forever knew.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
